title: Odyssey, Book 5: Calypso's Island
description: Book 5 of Homer's Odyssey: Calypso's Island.
introduction: Book 5 of the Odyssey: Calypso's Island. The Greek text follows the standard Homeric vulgate.

translation.original_text: Ἠὼς δ᾿ ἐκ λεχέων παρ᾿ ἀγαυοῦ Τιθωνοῖο ὄρνυθ᾿.
translation.text: Dawn rose from beside lordly Tithonus. The gods sent Hermes to Calypso's island to order her to release Odysseus. She obeyed reluctantly: 'You gods are cruel — you grudge us goddesses our mortal lovers.' Odysseus built a raft and sailed for seventeen days before Poseidon sent a storm that shattered it. He swam for two days and reached the land of the Phaeacians.
